items.caption: A credit card with a credit card number displayed on it, set against a dark blue background. the credit card is illustrated with a layer of snow on top and icicles hanging down, suggesting a theme of freezing or being frozen. the text "credit card" is visible on the card, and the number "1234 5678 9012 3456" is printed on the front. the illustration is a digital artwork with a stylized, cartoon-like quality.
